entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop (Cajanus cajan L. Huth) cultivated in the Indian subcontinent.

entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC DISEASE
entities.description: A major disease affecting pigeonpea cultivation, causing sterility and yield loss.

entities.name: INDIAN SUBCONTINENT
entities.description: The geographical region where pigeonpea cultivation and SMD are prevalent.

entities.name: CHEMICAL CONTROL METHODS
entities.description: Approaches using chemicals to manage diseases, noted as economically unviable and unsustainable for SMD.

entities.name: ACARICIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents used to kill mites, used as a control method for SMD.

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The inherent ability of a plant to resist a disease, preferred for managing SMD.

entities.name: SMD RESISTANCE
entities.description: The specific ability of pigeonpea genotypes to resist Sterility Mosaic Disease.

entities.name: KHARIF SEASONS
entities.description: The monsoon cropping season during which the pigeonpea genotypes were evaluated.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Efforts to develop improved pigeonpea varieties with enhanced traits like SMD resistance.

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC INSIGHTS
entities.description: Observations based on the physical characteristics and disease incidence of the genotypes.

entities.name: RESISTANT GENOTYPES
entities.description: Pigeonpea accessions and breeding lines that exhibit low disease incidence of SMD.

entities.name: LRG-471
entities.description: A specific pigeonpea genotype identified as resistant to SMD.
